member.name: T:VectorMath
member.summary: Class containing vector math utility methods.

member.name: M:VectorMath.Magnitude(System.Double[])
member.summary: Calculates and returns the magnitude (length) of a given vector.
member.param: The vector as a double array (2D or 3D).
member.returns: The magnitude rounded to the nearest hundredth, or -1 if not 2D or 3D.
